title: Pharmacist

rationales.taskAutomation: Prescription verification, interaction screening, claims adjudication and inventory ordering are substantially automatable; clinical consultation and complex therapy management are not.
rationales.toolMaturity: Robotic dispensing and AI interaction-checking are mature and standard in most large pharmacy operations.
rationales.adoption: AI-driven dispensing and adjudication tools are common across large retail and hospital pharmacy chains.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agentic workflows can run verification-to-dispensing end to end with a pharmacist checking exceptions, though the final clinical check-off stays licensed and human.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-1051 (Pharmacists), p25-p75 rounded
insight: Robotic dispensing and AI interaction-checking now run routine fills close to end to end, with a pharmacist reviewing exceptions. Pharmacists moving into clinical consultation and medication-therapy management are seeing their scope grow, not shrink.
